title: Lipemia — Turbid Specimen
content: Lipemic specimens scatter light and can interfere with photometric and turbidimetric assays. Mild lipemia: accept_with_notation with a QC comment noting possible analyte bias. Marked lipemia obscuring the serum/plasma layer: reject and require a fasting recollection, since ultracentrifugation is not available at this site. If the ordered panel does not include lipid-sensitive analytes (e.g. a molecular or genetic test), lipemia does not by itself require rejection — accept_with_notation is sufficient.
